versions.changelog_entry: Initial spec: 7 Jupyter notebooks, Plotly chart theme, Quarto config, Makefile, Git LFS, Cloudflare Pages deployment.
feat: add expert-witness-grade methodology appendix, FindingStrength confidence taxonomy for non-technical readers, pre-registration document template

feat: expand from 7 to 10 notebooks with forensic layout rules — add 00_power_analysis (pre-registration), 02_corpus_audit (chain of custody), 08_control_comparison (confound elimination); mandatory header cells with provenance metadata; Quarto book format with parts; narrative-first cell ordering pattern
